user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for checking in — I completely understand why it’s frustrating to see your feature request still open after 6 months. We really appreciate you taking the time to share the idea with us, and I’m sorry we haven’t provided a clearer update sooner.

Your request is still open because it hasn’t been declined, but it also hasn’t yet been scheduled for development. Our product team reviews requests based on factors like customer impact, demand from other users, technical complexity, and current roadmap priorities.

I don’t want to overpromise a timeline, but I can confirm that your feedback is still being tracked and considered. I’ll add your latest follow-up to the request so the product team has the most current context.

If you’re open to it, could you share a bit more about how this feature would help your workflow today? Any details about the impact, workaround you’re using, or urgency will help us better prioritize it.

Thanks again for your patience and for helping us improve the product.

Best,  
[Support Team]
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed its instructions to draft a response using an empathetic tone and professional style without violating any operational boundaries.
